title: Orchestration-first promo site & docs refresh
description:
Reposition the ticks.sh promo site (cloud/worker/src/landing.ts) and supporting docs from the old standalone-runner / issue-tracker story to the agent-orchestration story, while keeping the issue-tracker foundation as a co-equal pillar.

Full plan and rationale: docs/promo-website-orchestration-update-roadmap.md

Decisions (locked with user 2026-06-15):
- Hero = Candidate A: 'The issue tracker your AI agents run on.'
- Swarm visual = animated CSS/SVG (option B), with prefers-reduced-motion static fallback.
- Scope = Everything: website + first-party /docs page + refresh stale design docs.

Why now: the current site's primary CTA ('tk run epic --board') references a REMOVED command and is live-broken.

Verification (from .tick/config.md): worker changes verified with 'cd cloud/worker && pnpm exec tsc --noEmit' plus targeted vitest; epic integrates via PR + green CI (no direct merge to main). landing.ts is a worker file, NOT the UI — build-ui.sh does not apply.
